communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

According to https://apps.dot.illinois.gov/eplan/desenv/092024/013-62W79/62W79-013.pdf, engineers installing equipment onto IDOT infrastructure is required to,"Document with pictures and notify IDOT Traffic Signal Engineer of any 3rd party equipment such as but not limited to LPRs, cameras, antennas mounted on IDOT maintained signals"

Please provide me with all photos documented that would have been created as part of this contractual agreement. 

Please limit the scope to any photos taken from Jan 1, 2024 through the present date.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

LPL

title: James Tim Bryan Complaints and Disciplinary Report (Foley Police Department)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Alabama Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting records pertaining to James Timothy Bryan's employment with said agencies. I am requesting the following including but not limited to; dates of employment, status of rehire, internal investigation reports and findings, complaints made against James T. Bryan, internal investigation findings, disciplinary records, policies related to employment at the time of employment..

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

André Natta, a citizen of Alabama, in coordination with Ashley.
